case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS ALARCON, JOSE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $219.16 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT ALARCON, JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALARCON, JOSE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-25-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-06-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-06-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-03-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS FOR WATER BILLS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALARCON, JOSE $219.16 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $245.16 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ALARCON, JOSE
